Party_Details.Name: Rabiah Bee Bte Mohamed Ibrahim

Facts.Text: Rabiah Bee Bte Mohamed Ibrahim filed the lawsuit against Salem Ibrahim.
Rabiah Bee and Salem Ibrahim agreed to enter a joint venture to buy and refurbish properties in London.
Oral agreement made between Rabiah Bee and Salem Ibrahim to invest equally in the joint venture.
Rabiah Bee contributed £100,000 to the joint venture.
Rabiah Bee accused Salem Ibrahim of not keeping proper accounts and using venture funds for personal expenses.
Settlement agreement signed to dissolve the joint venture.
Rabiah Bee received an account from Salem Ibrahim prepared by Gane Shawn & Partners.
Rabiah Bee filed the statement of claim against Salem Ibrahim.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether a partner in a joint venture can demand an account and compensation for management efforts without a formal written agreement.
Party_Details.Rule: Partners in a joint venture must account for all dealings and are entitled to reasonable compensation for efforts unless otherwise agreed.
Party_Details.Application: The Plaintiff argued that she was entitled to compensation for her management efforts and an account of the venture's finances. The Defendant contended that the settlement agreement resolved all disputes and no further accounting was necessary.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that while the settlement agreement addressed some issues, the Plaintiff was entitled to an account of the venture's finances and reasonable compensation for her efforts.

Party_Details.Name: Salem Ibrahim

Facts.Text: Salem Ibrahim was named as the defendant in the lawsuit filed by Rabiah Bee.
Salem Ibrahim and Rabiah Bee agreed to enter a joint venture to buy and refurbish properties in London.
Oral agreement made between Salem Ibrahim and Rabiah Bee to invest equally in the joint venture.
Salem Ibrahim received £100,000 from Rabiah Bee as her contribution to the joint venture.
Salem Ibrahim was accused by Rabiah Bee of not keeping proper accounts and using venture funds for personal expenses.
Settlement agreement signed to dissolve the joint venture.
Salem Ibrahim provided an account to Rabiah Bee prepared by Gane Shawn & Partners.
Salem Ibrahim filed a defense and counterclaim against Rabiah Bee.

Party_Details.Issue: Whether a joint venture partner is legally responsible for providing a full account of venture finances and compensating the other partner for management efforts.
Party_Details.Rule: A partner in a joint venture must provide a full account of all financial dealings and compensate the other partner for management efforts unless otherwise agreed.
Party_Details.Application: The Defendant argued that the settlement agreement resolved all disputes and no further accounting was necessary. The Plaintiff contended that she was entitled to an account of the venture's finances and compensation for her management efforts.
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court determined that the Defendant was required to provide a full account of the venture's finances and compensate the Plaintiff for her management efforts, despite the settlement agreement.
